context: Tests whether the agent builds the cohort table and LTV table in the required formats, includes the time-to-second-order distribution in the specified buckets, references the median time to second order in the context of email flow sequencing (at ~70% of median), and saves to the correct file path.

checklist.name: Cohort table structure
checklist.description: Report includes a cohort table organized by acquisition month with columns for cohort size and repeat % at multiple time intervals (30d, 90d, 180d, or similar)

checklist.name: LTV by cohort table
checklist.description: Report includes an LTV (lifetime value or revenue per customer) table by acquisition month at multiple time horizons (30d, 90d, 180d, 365d or equivalent)

checklist.name: Time-to-second-order distribution
checklist.description: Report includes a time-to-second-order distribution table with buckets (0-7d, 8-30d, 31-60d, 61-90d, 91-180d, >180d or equivalent)

checklist.name: Median used for email sequencing
checklist.description: Report references the median time to second order and connects it to email flow timing — specifically that the win-back or second-order nudge email should fire at approximately 70% of the median (or equivalent framing)

checklist.name: Returning customer rate headline
checklist.description: Report includes the headline returning customer rate metric with a verdict against the healthy range for subscription/D2C brands

checklist.name: Lapsed customer pool estimate
checklist.description: Report identifies and sizes the pool of customers who haven't reordered past a threshold (lapsed pool section or equivalent)

checklist.name: Repeat by acquisition channel section
checklist.description: Report includes a section on repeat behavior by acquisition channel (even if placeholder or note that cross-channel data was not available)

checklist.name: TL;DR section
checklist.description: Report opens with a TL;DR covering repeat rate, median time to second order, top cohort LTV, and biggest opportunity

checklist.name: Prioritized recommendations
checklist.description: Report includes recommendations structured by priority (P0/P1/P2 or equivalent) with email flow timing mentioned

checklist.name: Benchmark comparison
checklist.description: Report compares returning customer rate to a benchmark or 'healthy band' for D2C or subscription businesses
